metadata.description: Rules-based structural index backtest. TCS-150 and TCS Sapphire 50 across monthly, quarterly, and semi-annual rebalance frequencies.

tcs150.name: TCS-150 Composite Index
tcs150.description: Top 150 lowest composite structural risk scores. Interest-bearing firms only. 100% FCF-anchored by construction.
tcs150.selection: 150 lowest composite scores, interest-bearing universe, 12-month price history minimum

sapphire50.name: TCS Sapphire 50 Cohort Index
sapphire50.description: Very Low on all three axes simultaneously. Top 50 by composite score. Interest-bearing, 100% FCF-anchored by construction.
sapphire50.selection: Very Low axis1 + axis2 + axis3, top 50 composite, interest-bearing, 12-month price history minimum

metadata.methodology: At each rebalance date, constituents selected per index rules from that month's structural snapshot. Equal-weighted median return computed to next rebalance date. Period returns chained to cumulative growth curve indexed to 100.
metadata.disclaimer: Historical rules-based simulation. Does not account for transaction costs, liquidity, or position sizing. Not investment advice.
